name: E2E: the full 118-rule corpus is 4-axis-tagged + routable with enforcement parity preserved, and the whole plugin is commercial-sale safe
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-applies-to-parity.sh" 2>p.txt; pe=$?; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-commercial-license.sh" 2>cl.txt; ce=$?; [ "$pe" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green rules=118 parity_fail=0 unrouted=0' p.txt && [ "$ce" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'commercial-license status=green' cl.txt && echo e2e10-end-state-guarantee 1>&2
